changes.description: Simulacrum duration has been increased from 20 to 22 seconds.

Potency upon learning the trait Ranged Mastery has been changed from 600 to 700.

Potency when 1 Coda is active has been increased from 600 to 700. Potency when 2 Coda are active has been increased from 700 to 800. Potency when 3 Coda are active has been increased from 1,000 to 1,100.

Increase to own magic damage changed from 5% to 10%.

In accordance with the removal of Enhanced Manafication, recast time has been reduced from 120 to 110 seconds. Now temporarily increases the ranges of Enchanted Riposte, Enchanted Zwerchhau, and Enchanted Redoublement to 25 yalms. The additional effect "Grants 6 stacks of Manafication" has been changed to "Grants 3 stacks of Magicked Swordplay." The duration remains at 30 seconds. The additional effect "Grants Prefulgence Ready upon consuming 6 stacks of Manafication" has been changed to "Grants Prefulgence Ready." The duration remains at 30 seconds.
Potency has been increased from 900 to 950.
Action change settings can now be enabled to switch Prefulgence with Manafication.
This trait has been removed.
This trait has been removed.
In conjunction with the removal of Enhanced Manafication and Enhanced Manafication II, Enhanced Manafication III will be renamed Enhanced Manafication.
Potency upon learning the trait White Magic Mastery has been changed from 340 to 350.
Potency upon learning the trait White Magic Mastery has been changed from 1,360 to 1,400.
The effect "Grants Confession to nearby party members" has been changed to "Grants Confession to nearby party members, reducing damage taken by 10%." The duration remains at 10 seconds.
Potency upon learning the trait Tactician's Mastery has been changed from 80 to 85.

Damage reduction effect duration has been increased from 5 to 10 seconds. The effect "Effects will be applied continuously to self and all party members standing within the celestial ring" has been changed to "Wheel of Fortune will be applied continuously to self and all party members standing within the celestial ring."
Potency upon learning the trait Magick Mastery has been changed from 80 to 85.
MP cost has been reduced from 2,500 to 2,000.
When targeting a player under the effect of Guard, the effect that increases damage taken will not be applied. Instead, the strength of Guard will be halved.

Potency of the Biolytic effect reducing a target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 20% to 15%. HP and MP restored when targets under the effect of Sole Survivor are KO'd has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Healing over time potency has been reduced from 6,000 to 5,000. Damage over time potency has been reduced from 6,000 to 5,000.
Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.

Potency has been increased from 4,000~8,000 to 5,000~10,000.
Potency has been increased from 16,000 to 18,000.
Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000. Damage over time potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Potency of the barrier created when attacking two or more targets has been increased from 9,000 to 10,000.

Potency has been increased from 12,000 to 15,000.
Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Potency of the effect reducing a target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Effects of the action now extend through obstructions on the field.
Effects of the action now extend through obstructions on the field.
Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 18 seconds.
Potency of the Protect effect reducing damage taken has been increased from 8% to 10%.
Potency of the Biolytic effect reducing a target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
When targeting a player under the effect of Guard, the effect that increases damage taken will not be applied. Instead, the strength of Guard will be halved.
Effects of the action now extend through obstructions on the field.

new_content.name: Hell on Rails
new_content.description: A new trial has been added.

new_content.name: Hell on Rails (Extreme)
new_content.description: Hell on Rails (Extreme) can only be accessed via the Raid Finder.

new_content.name: Mistwake
new_content.description: A new dungeon, Mistwake, has been added.

new_content.name: Arcadion: Heavyweight Division
new_content.description: The new raid dungeon AAC Heavyweight Tier has been added.

new_content.name: Arcadion: Heavyweight Division (Savage)
new_content.description: The new raid dungeon AAC Heavyweight Tier (Savage) has been added.

new_content.name: Worqor Chirteh (Triumph)
new_content.description: Worqor Chirteh (Triumph) has been added to Frontline. Three teams of adventurers, each representing one of the three Grand Companies, will do battle in teams of twenty-four on an ancient Yok Huy battlefield. Subject to changes in weather and the appearance of snow spirits, players must take both the blessings and burdens of the land in stride as they navigate the path to victory!

new_content.name: With the Winds
new_content.description: New main scenario quests have been added.

new_content.name: The Arcadion
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quests have been added.

new_content.name: Tool Enhancement Quests - Cosmic Tools
new_content.description: Additional features will be implemented in future updates: Tool Enhancement Quests - Cosmic Tools, and Weapon Enhancement Quests - Phantom Weapons are scheduled to release in Patch 7.41.

new_content.name: Weapon Enhancement Quests - Phantom Weapons
new_content.description: Additional features will be implemented in future updates: Tool Enhancement Quests - Cosmic Tools, and Weapon Enhancement Quests - Phantom Weapons are scheduled to release in Patch 7.41.

new_content.name: The Merchant's Tale
new_content.description: The new variant dungeon (The Merchant's Tale) and Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures sidequests are scheduled to release in Patch 7.45.

new_content.name: Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures
new_content.description: The new variant dungeon (The Merchant's Tale) and Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures sidequests are scheduled to release in Patch 7.45.

new_content.name: Oizys
new_content.description: Oizys─the new cosmic exploration destination, Tool Enhancement Quests - Cosmic Tools, and Weapon Enhancement Quests - Phantom Weapons are scheduled to release in Patch 7.41.

new_content.name: Strategy Board
new_content.description: The strategy board feature has been added. Strategy boards are designed to help coordinate with party members and overcome challenging duties. They are created using a combination of icons, symbols, and markers, and can be displayed while undertaking duties and shared with fellow players.

new_content.name: Command Panel
new_content.description: The Command Panel feature has been added. The Command Panel is a new interface that allows you to register various actions and commands. Each panel contains 25 slots, and a total of four panels are accessible. Any action or command that can be registered to the hotbar can be registered to the Command Panel.

housing.name: FFXIV Furnishing Design Contest
housing.description: Furnishings from the FFXIV Furnishing Design Contest have been added.

housing.name: Furnishings inspired by entries that did not win
housing.description: Furnishings inspired by entries that did not win have also been added.

housing.name: New furnishings
housing.description: New furnishings have been added.

housing.name: New orchestrion rolls
housing.description: New orchestrion rolls have been added.

housing.name: New aquarium fish
housing.description: New aquarium fish have been added.

housing.name: Tea Flower Seeds
housing.description: A new seed for flowerpots has been added. Tea Flower Seeds can be purchased from the following vendors: Mist (X:11.0 Y:11.4) – Material Supplier, The Lavender Beds (X:11.9 Y:8.3) – Material Supplier, The Goblet (X:10.9 Y:8.9) – Material Supplier, Shirogane (X:10.5 Y:12.1) - Material Supplier, Empyreum (X:10.2 Y:12.2) - Material Supplier, Apartments - Apartment Merchant, New Gridania (X:11.0 Y:11.2) - Tanie

housing.name: Forged Leaves Ceiling Light
housing.description: An ornate light fixture featuring intricately wrought metal foliage.

housing.name: Imitation Battlefield
housing.description: Rusted weapons and torn banners stud a patch of scorched earth in this lifelike replica of a grim battlefield.

housing.name: Frosted Topiary
housing.description: A closely cropped shrub topped with a thick layer of snow.

housing.name: Mhachi Lamppost
housing.description: This ornate, somewhat somber lamppost appears to be of ancient Mhachi design.

housing.name: Frozen Garden Pond
housing.description: The waters of this snow-dusted pond are frozen still as the depths of winter.

housing.name: Everkeep Mixing Booth
housing.description: A futuristic array of audio equipment bristling with buttons and dials that simply demand to be fiddled with.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Beverage Rack
housing.description: Stocked with a selection of libations served at popular Tuliyollan establishments.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Bench
housing.description: A robust bench designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Screen
housing.description: A painted wooden partition of Tuliyollan design.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Stool
housing.description: A sturdy round stool designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Fortune-teller's Table
housing.description: A modest round table laden with all the fortune-telling accoutrements one could need.

housing.name: Lakeland Planter
housing.description: An ornate wooden barrel sporting a lilac-leaved tree reminiscent of Lakeland foliage.

housing.name: Eulmore Planter
housing.description: This gilded potted plant embodies Eulmore's unseemly decadence.

housing.name: Straight Tuliyollan Counter
housing.description: A merchant's counter designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Curved Tuliyollan Counter
housing.description: A rounded counter designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Table
housing.description: A cloth-covered table designed in the Tuliyollan style.

housing.name: Sampler Board
housing.description: A tasteful arrangement of appetizers, perfect for a sophisticated soirée or humble family gathering. Cannot be retrieved once used. Can be used up to 10 times. Meal benefits when used: Spell Speed Bonus: +4% (Max 10), VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12), Gear Durability Bonus: +3, EXP Bonus: +3% Duration: 30m (Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings).

housing.name: Adventurer's Effects
housing.description: Ideal for storing oddments accumulated over the course of countless adventures.

housing.name: Occult Compass
housing.description: A curious compass perhaps once used by an isle-bound recluse, perhaps not.

housing.name: Occult Pyramicula
housing.description: A perplexing pyramidal ornament of the like appreciated by mysterious recluses residing on distant isles.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Censer
housing.description: An ornate censer of Tuliyollan design.

housing.name: Steaming Stew Bowl
housing.description: Piping hot stew served in a rustic wooden bowl. Cannot be retrieved once used. Can be used up to 10 times. Meal benefits when used: Tenacity Bonus: +4% (Max 10), VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12), Gear Durability Bonus: +3, EXP Bonus: +3% Duration: 30m (Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings).

housing.name: Il Mheg Planter
housing.description: Features a slender tree snaking its way out of a miniature Lyhe Ghiah.

housing.name: Minishroom Lamp
housing.description: This organic light source features a cluster of faintly glowing mushrooms sprouting from a mossy globe.

housing.name: Doom-engine Levinbox
housing.description: Modeled after the motive apparatus of a monstrous locomotive. One per estate only.

housing.name: Unfriendly Yan Neon Wall Light
housing.description: A vivid wall light designed in the likeness of an otherworldly─and if its stern countenance is any indication, highly belligerent─sheep spirit.

housing.name: Peeling Wallpaper Sticker
housing.description: Give your abode an air of studied neglect, without investing the time required for such cosmetic damage to occur naturally.

housing.name: Tuliyollan Rug
housing.description: A rectangular rug woven in the Tuliyollan fashion.

housing.name: Tea Flower Seeds
housing.description: Should you require more motivation in your horticultural endeavors, simply picture all the delightfully fragrant mugs of tea you will be enjoying once these seeds have bloomed. For use in planters.

glamour.name: Red Tea Flower Corsage
glamour.description: A bunch of red tea flowers, selectively fertilized to achieve their vibrant color. Bouquets can be placed within select vases for display in estates.

The Faces We Wear - Blindfold Eyepatch (Left)
glamour.description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on partially vision-obscuring eyepatches of varying colors. Use to unlock the blindfold eyepatch (left) facewear.

glamour.name: The Faces We Wear - Blindfold Eyepatch (Right)
glamour.description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on partially vision-obscuring eyepatches of varying colors. Use to unlock the blindfold eyepatch (right) facewear.

glamour.name: Ballroom Etiquette - Erudite Idleness
glamour.description: An illustrated manual on how to appear scholarly─rather than simply shy─when struggling to socialize at soirées. Use to learn the /carrybook emote.

glamour.name: Runaway Barding
glamour.description: A suit of chocobo armor designed to resemble the Doomtrain.
